wordplay_note: Federal agent who runs Donna as a handler
card_description: Mike Westaway is a character in Philip K. Dick's *A Scanner Darkly*. Donna's handler in the federal narcotics operation. Name note: Federal agent who runs Donna as a handler. The invisible hand of state control behind personal relationships. First appears in *A Scanner Darkly*. Context: "Dick formalizes his "Ham Sandwich" model of reality: a triune structure of Teacher (Zebra) / Artifact World (The "Ham") / Pupils (Humans)."

linked_segments.summary: Dick formalizes his "Ham Sandwich" model of reality: a triune structure of Teacher (Zebra) / Artifact World (The "Ham") / Pupils (Humans). He concludes that the empirical world is a "slave labor camp"
linked_segments.title: 1976-09-15_Dorothy_76.txt

reference.brief: Donna's handler in the federal narcotics operation
reference.significance: The invisible hand of state control behind personal relationships
